_README: Runtime model-catalog data loaded by llm/catalog.py. Per provider: model_env names the .env variable holding extra model ids (comma-separated), key_prefixes lists the .env API-key prefixes (numbered keys like NAME_1..N are auto-discovered), official_models is a static fallback model list used when the provider has no live /models endpoint. If this file is missing or invalid, llm/catalog.py falls back to its built-in defaults.
